rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in valid component type scopes with visible identifiers only
Use annex agree blocks for type-level assumptions and guarantees with concrete bounds
generic_rules: Ensure all identifiers in AGREE contracts are visible in the current scope
Validate that helper declarations match the types of their expressions
Use only AADL-defined scalar types (int, real, bool) in AGREE declarations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Assumptions and guarantees should reference visible component features or declared helpers
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing non-visible identifiers or package-qualified names in AGREE contracts
Do not mix implementation-level bindings with component type contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
Subcomponent port usage in type contracts
